speaker: AJAX
text: Troilus, thou coward Troilus, show thy head!

speaker: DIOMEDES
text: Troilus, I say! Where’s Troilus?

speaker: AJAX
text: What wouldst thou?

speaker: DIOMEDES
text: I would correct him.

speaker: AJAX
text: Were I the General, thou shouldst have my office

speaker: AJAX
text: Ere that correction.—Troilus, I say! What, Troilus!

speaker: TROILUS
text: O traitor Diomed! Turn thy false face, thou traitor,

speaker: TROILUS
text: And pay the life thou owest me for my horse!

speaker: DIOMEDES
text: Ha! Art thou there?

speaker: AJAX
text: I’ll fight with him alone. Stand, Diomed.

speaker: DIOMEDES
text: He is my prize. I will not look upon.

speaker: TROILUS
text: Come, both you cogging Greeks. Have at you both!

speaker: HECTOR
text: Yea, Troilus? O, well fought, my youngest brother!

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Now do I see thee. Ha! Have at thee, Hector!

speaker: HECTOR
text: Pause if thou wilt.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: I do disdain thy courtesy, proud Trojan.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Be happy that my arms are out of use.

speaker: ACHILLES
text: My rest and negligence befriends thee now,

speaker: ACHILLES
text: But thou anon shalt hear of me again;

speaker: ACHILLES
text: Till when, go seek thy fortune.

speaker: HECTOR
text: Fare thee well.

speaker: HECTOR
text: I would have been much more a fresher man

speaker: HECTOR
text: Had I expected thee.

speaker: HECTOR
text: How now, my brother?

speaker: TROILUS
text: Ajax hath ta’en Aeneas. Shall it be?

speaker: TROILUS
text: No, by the flame of yonder glorious heaven,

speaker: TROILUS
text: He shall not carry him. I’ll be ta’en too

speaker: TROILUS
text: Or bring him off. Fate, hear me what I say!

speaker: TROILUS
text: I reck not though I end my life today.

speaker: HECTOR
text: Stand, stand, thou Greek! Thou art a goodly mark.

speaker: HECTOR
text: No? Wilt thou not? I like thy armor well.

speaker: HECTOR
text: I’ll frush it and unlock the rivets all,

speaker: HECTOR
text: But I’ll be master of it.

speaker: HECTOR
text: Wilt thou not, beast, abide?

speaker: HECTOR
text: Why then, fly on. I’ll hunt thee for thy hide.
